assignments.description: Add photo names to the Case - Order. Set the Photo Attached field to True.
assignments.name: SetPhotoAttachedI
assignments.label: SetPhotoAttached

assignments.description: The workflow is different if Orders are not available in Salesforce. This is a temporary condition because B2B Commerce is being rolled out after Cases.
assignments.name: SetWorkflowMode
assignments.label: SetWorkflowMode

assignments.description: Assign the value captured on the screen flow to the JDE SO # field. A text field was used on the object so that the input can be made mandatory when displayed but not when it is not displayed.
assignments.name: Update_JDE_SO
assignments.label: Update JDE SO #

decisions.description: Incorrect Manual, New Part Set-up, NSU and Technical Question are not tied to an Order.
decisions.name: NATT_Tied_to_Order
decisions.label: Tied to Order

decisions.description: checks the number of order products included
decisions.name: Num_of_Order_Products
decisions.label: Num of Order Products

Flow.description: Adds field selection to CTM Case Link Parts Screen

formulas.description: Determines if the Screen field should be visible
formulas.name: AdditionalDetailCustomerCommentsFieldVisible
formulas.expression: CASE( {!Get_Case_Information.CTM_Case_Reason__c}, "Complaint",1, "Concealed Damage",1, "Coverage Information",1, "Credit Memos",1, "Damages",1, "Freight Company Complaints",1, "Freight Company Damage",1, "Incorrect Part Received",1, "Invoice issue",1, "Missing Parts",1, "Overage",1, "Package Labeled Wrong",1, "Part Issue",1, "Product Documentation",1, "Short Shipment",1 ,0 ) == 1

formulas.description: Determines if the Screen field should be visible
formulas.name: DisputedQuantityFieldVisible
formulas.expression: CASE( {!Get_Case_Information.CTM_Case_Reason__c}, "Availability",1, "Back Order",1, "Complaint",1, "Concealed Damage",1, "Coverage Information",1, "Credit Memos",1, "Credits",1, "Customer Ordered in Error",1, "Damages",1, "Freight Company Damage",1, "Incorrect Part Received",1, "Instructions not clear",1, "Invoice issue",1, "Missing Parts",1, "Order Entry Error",1, "Order Status/Tracking",1, "Overage",1, "Package Labeled Wrong",1, "Part Issue",1, "Product Documentation",1, "Short Shipment",1 ,0 ) == 1

formulas.description: Determines if the Screen field should be visible
formulas.name: ModelSerialNumberFieldVisible

formulas.description: Determines if the Screen field should be visible
formulas.name: PackingSlipFieldVisible
formulas.expression: CASE({!Get_Case_Information.CTM_Case_Reason__c}, "Complaint",1, "Concealed Damage",1, "Damages",1, "Freight Company Complaints",1, "Freight Company Damage",1, "Incorrect Part Received",1, "Missing Parts",1, "Package Labeled Wrong",1, "Short Shipment",1 ,0 ) == 1

formulas.name: PartNumVisible
formulas.expression: CASE( {!Get_Case_Information.CTM_Case_Reason__c}, "Availability",1, "Back Order",1, "Complaint",1, "Concealed Damage",1, "Coverage Information",1, "Credit Memos",1, "Credits",1, "Customer Ordered in Error",1, "Damages",1, "Freight Company Complaints",1, "Freight Company Damage",1, "Incorrect Part Received",1, "Instructions not clear",1, "Invoice issue",1, "Missing Parts",1, "Order Entry Error",1, "Order Status/Tracking",1, "Overage",1, "Package Labeled Wrong",1, "Part Issue",1, "Product Documentation",1, "Short Shipment",1 ,0 ) == 1

formulas.description: Determines if the Screen field should be visible
formulas.name: PhotoFieldVisible
formulas.expression: CASE( {!Get_Case_Information.CTM_Case_Reason__c}, "Complaint",1, "Concealed Damage",1, "Damages",1, "Freight Company Damage",1, "Incorrect Part Received",1, "Package Labeled Wrong",1 ,0 ) == 1

Flow.interviewLabel: CTM Case Link Parts Screen II {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: CTM Case Link Parts Screen II

loops.description: Count the number of photos attached
loops.name: CheckPhotosI
loops.label: CheckPhotosI

loops.description: Count the number of photos attached
loops.name: CheckPhotosII
loops.label: CheckPhotosII

fields.name: ErrorMessage
fields.fieldText: ¡Lo siento! Se ha producido un error.

screens.description: lets the user update fields that go directly on the case sales order that gets created
screens.name: UpdateCaseSalesOrderFields
screens.label: UpdateCaseSalesOrderFields

fields.name: AddFieldsDisplayText
fields.fieldText: Actualizar valores para {!Loop_Order_Products.Part_Number__c}, {!Loop_Order_Products.NATT_Product_Name__c}

value.stringValue: Las fotos adjuntas estarán disponibles en los Archivos en la lista relacionada del Caso.

screens.description: lets the user update fields that go directly on the case sales order that gets created
screens.name: UpdateCaseSalesOrderFields_0
screens.label: UpdateCaseSalesOrderFields

fields.name: AddFieldsDisplayText_0
fields.fieldText: Actualizar Valores para el Pedido o Producto

fields.name: SalesOrderInstructions
fields.fieldText: Actualice los valores para la orden de venta del transportista y/o el número de pieza.

fields.name: JDE_Sales_Order
fields.helpText: Ingrese su número de orden de venta JDE

fields.name: PartNumberLinkInstructions
fields.fieldText: Seleccione Número de pieza haciendo clic en el cuadro a continuación y escribiendo un nombre/descripción de pieza (p. ej., generador) o especificando el Número de pieza.

fields.name: PartNumberFreeFormInstructions
fields.fieldText: Siempre es mejor utilizar el enlace de número de parte para especificar un número de parte. Esto reduce el tiempo de procesamiento del caso. Si no puede utilizar el enlace del número de parte, incluya el número de parte en de 'parte #' (texto de forma libre) y en el cuadro 'Descripción del número de parte' (texto de forma libre) a continuación.

value.stringValue: Attached photos will be available in the Files on the related list on the Case.

variables.description: The Case Order junction object to create
variables.name: colCaseSalesOrderRecords

variables.description: Photos for the Sales - Order are attached to the Case for ease of access. The names are stored on the Case - Order.
variables.name: CTM_PhotosAttached

variables.description: At initial rollout of Cases the Orders were not available in Salesforce. This variable is used to determine if an alternative workflow should be applied.
variables.name: OrdersAvailableinSalesforce

variables.description: Single Variable to combine names of files attached into a text stream.
variables.name: PhotosAttachedSingleVariable

variables.description: contains the last file name of the looped text collection, file uploaded
variables.name: varFileName
